allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(list\(d.get\('data',d\).keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d.get\('data',d\),dict\) else d, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pe=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('practiceExercises',[]\); print\(json.dumps\(pe[0] if pe else 'empty', indent=2\)\)")
